## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new skill or new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix in skill content or tooling
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî add or update tests
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî maintenance (deps, config, CI)
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code restructuring, no behaviour change
- [ ] `style` ‚Äî formatting or markdownlint fixes
- [ ] `build` ‚Äî build system changes
